sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
1. the paschal sacrifice, the paschal lamb,
4. the paschal festival, the feast of Passover
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of Chaldee origin (compare [H6453]); the Passover (the meal, the day, the festival or the special sacrifices connected with it): - Easter, Passover.
